report_name: EU Cybersecurity Centre Opens Call for Experts to Oversee Billions in Digital Funding

identities.name: European Cybersecurity Competence Centre (ECCC)
identities.description: The European Union's main body for pooling investment in cybersecurity, which has issued a public call for independent experts to assist in the evaluation and oversight of projects funded by the EU.

identities.name: European Union
identities.description: A political and economic union whose flagship programs, Digital Europe and Horizon Europe, are funding cybersecurity projects managed by the ECCC.

identities.name: Digital Europe Programme
identities.description: A flagship EU funding program for which the ECCC is seeking experts to evaluate and monitor cybersecurity projects.

identities.name: Horizon Europe
identities.description: A flagship EU funding program for which the ECCC is seeking experts to evaluate and monitor cybersecurity projects.

identities.name: European Commission
identities.description: The executive branch of the European Union, mentioned as the broader apparatus responsible for the Digital Europe and Horizon Europe programs.
